title: Water Crews Working to Repair Water Main Leak on Midland Avenue
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is actively repairing a water main leak at the intersection of West Colvin Street and Midland Avenue. Service disruptions are expected in the area during repairs, and traffic impacts are compounded by an ongoing Onondaga County infrastructure project. The CIO should note potential coordination needs between city water infrastructure systems and county projects.
processing_notes: Author field listed as Unknown; press contact provided via Office of Communications
No dollar amounts or budget impact specified in release
Interdepartmental coordination implicit: water main repair + county infrastructure project on same corridor suggests need for GIS/project tracking integration
Contact phone number provided (315-448-8360) indicates constituent service readiness
No specific timeline for repair completion mentioned
